channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [INDBNK] Ind Bank Housing Appoints T R Chandrasekaran & Associates as Internal Auditor
item.description:
Ind Bank Housing Ltd's Board of Directors, at their meeting on April 13, 2026, approved the appointment of M/s. T R Chandrasekaran & Associates, Practicing Chartered Accountants, as the Internal Auditor for the Financial Year 2026-27. CA T.R. Chandrasekaran, a senior member of the Institute of Chartered Accountants of India, possesses over 30 years of experience in the banking and financial services sector, specializing in finance, audit, and compliance. His expertise includes handling various audits for nationalized and private sector banks.

  • Ind Bank Housing appointed T R Chandrasekaran & Associates as Internal Auditor.
  • The appointment is for the Financial Year 2026-27.
  • CA T.R. Chandrasekaran has over 30 years of audit experience.
  • The firm will enhance internal control and compliance.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: IND BANK HOUSING LTD. | Category: Auditor

item.title: [KAYA] Kaya Ltd CFO Arihant Dhariwal resigns; Brijesh Goyal appointed
item.description:
Kaya Ltd announced the resignation of its Chief Financial Officer, Mr. Arihant Dhariwal, effective July 10, 2026, as he pursues opportunities outside the organization. Concurrently, the company has appointed Mr. Brijesh Goyal as the Chief Financial Officer (Designate), effective April 13, 2026. Mr. Goyal, a seasoned finance leader with over 30 years of experience, including significant roles at Reliance Retail and Enrich Hair & Skin Solutions, will assume the full CFO role from July 11, 2026, pending necessary approvals from the Audit Committee and Board of Directors.

  • Kaya's CFO, Arihant Dhariwal, resigned, effective July 10, 2026.
  • Brijesh Goyal appointed CFO (Designate) from April 13, 2026.
  • Goyal will assume full CFO role on July 11, 2026, pending approvals.
  • Goyal brings over 30 years of experience, including Reliance Retail.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Kaya Ltd | Category: Management Change

item.title: [BPCAP] B. P. Capital: Nil Investor Complaints for Q4 FY26
item.description:
B. P. Capital Ltd reported its statement of investor complaints for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026, in compliance with Regulation 13(3) of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The company recorded zero investor complaints pending at the beginning of the quarter, zero complaints received during the quarter, zero complaints disposed of, and zero complaints remaining unresolved at the end of the quarter. This indicates a clean record regarding investor grievance redressal for the period.

  • Zero investor complaints pending at the start of Q4 FY26.
  • No new investor complaints received during Q4 FY26.
  • Zero complaints were disposed of during the quarter.
  • No investor complaints remained unresolved by March 31, 2026.
  • Reflects effective investor grievance management.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: B. P. Capital Ltd | Category: Corporate Governance

item.title: [SWITCHTE] Switching Tech: No Deviation Report for Q4 FY26 Fundraise Proceeds
item.description:
Switching Technologies Gunther Ltd has informed the stock exchange that it has not undertaken any public issue, rights issue, preferential issue, or qualified institutional placement. Consequently, the company is not required to submit a statement of deviation or variation of proceeds for such issues for the quarter ending March 31, 2026, as per SEBI (LODR) Regulations 32(1), 32(2), and 33(3). This filing serves as a compliance update regarding the non-applicability of the deviation report.

  • Company confirms no public, rights, preferential issue, or QIP.
  • No deviation statement required for Q4 FY26 fundraise proceeds.
  • Filing ensures compliance with SEBI LODR Regulation 32.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SWITCHING TECHNOLOGIES GUNTHER LTD. | Category: Clarification

item.title: [MSUMI] Motherson Sumi Wiring: Noida labor protests not materially impacting ops
item.description:
Motherson Sumi Wiring India Ltd clarified recent media reports regarding labor protests in Noida and other cities. The company stated that this is a broader labor issue affecting multiple industries, driven by misinformation about wage revisions. Motherson Sumi Wiring confirmed that its operations remain compliant with all applicable laws and have not experienced any material impact. The company emphasized that employee safety is its top priority and noted that authorities are actively working with the industry to normalize the situation as quickly as possible.

  • Company clarifies media reports on labor protests in Noida.
  • Protests are a broader issue, not specific to the company.
  • Operations remain compliant with no material impact reported.
  • Employee safety is a top priority; authorities are involved.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Motherson Sumi Wiring India Ltd | Category: Clarification

item.title: [PPAP] PPAP Automotive: Independent Director Celine George Resigns
item.description:
Ms. Celine George has resigned as an Independent Director of PPAP Automotive Ltd, effective April 13, 2026. Her decision stems from a relocation from NCR to Bangalore, which made effective engagement in predominantly in-person board meetings challenging as the sole remote participant. She stated that this materially limited her level of engagement and contribution. Ms. George also holds an Independent Directorship in Uniparts India Limited, where she is a member of the Nomination and Remuneration Committee and Corporate Social Responsibility Committee. The company has requested confirmation from Ms. George that there are no other material reasons for her resignation.

  • Independent Director Celine George resigned from PPAP Automotive Ltd.
  • Resignation is effective April 13, 2026, due to relocation.
  • Remote participation in board meetings limited her engagement.
  • She also serves as an Independent Director for Uniparts India Limited.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: PPAP Automotive Limited | Category: Management Change

item.title: [TEXELIN] Texel Industries allots 1.75 lakh shares to promoter via warrant conversion
item.description:
Texel Industries Ltd's Finance and Investment Committee, in its meeting on April 13, 2026, approved the allotment of 1,75,000 equity shares to Avani Shailesh Mehta, a promoter, upon conversion of an equal number of fully convertible equity warrants. The shares were issued at an issue price of ₹38.25 each, including a premium of ₹28.25, following the receipt of the balance 75% consideration of ₹50,20,312.50. This conversion increases the company's total paid-up equity share capital from ₹13,56,84,280 to ₹13,74,34,280, comprising 1,37,43,428 fully paid-up equity shares. The newly allotted shares will rank pari-passu with existing equity shares.

  • Texel Industries allotted 1,75,000 equity shares from warrant conversion.
  • Shares issued to promoter Avani Shailesh Mehta at ₹38.25 per share.
  • Company received ₹50,20,312.50 as balance consideration for conversion.
  • Paid-up equity share capital increased from ₹13.57 crore to ₹13.74 crore.
  • 3,47,875 warrants remain pending for conversion by the allottee.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: TEXEL INDUSTRIES LTD. | Category: Corporate Action

item.title: [JCHAC] Bosch Home Comfort Board to meet May 19 for FY26 results
item.description:
Bosch Home Comfort India Ltd has announced that its Board of Directors will convene a meeting on May 19, 2026. The primary agenda for this meeting is to consider and approve the Audited Financial Results for the fiscal year ended March 31, 2026. This intimation serves to inform stakeholders about the upcoming review of the company's annual financial performance.

  • Board meeting scheduled for May 19, 2026.
  • Meeting to consider audited financial results.
  • Results for the fiscal year ended March 31, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Johnson Controls-Hitachi Air Conditioning India Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [RESPONIND] Responsive Industries Appoints Ruvi Bhansali as CFO
item.description:
Responsive Industries Ltd has announced the appointment of Mr. Ruvi Bhansali as its Chief Financial Officer (CFO) and Key Managerial Personnel (KMP), effective April 13, 2026. Mr. Bhansali brings over 18 years of experience in corporate strategy, strategic financial planning, fund management, and risk management. He holds an MBA in Finance and certifications in Market Regulations & Financial Analysis, making him a strategic business leader for the company.

  • Responsive Industries appointed Mr. Ruvi Bhansali as CFO and KMP.
  • His appointment is effective from April 13, 2026.
  • Mr. Bhansali has over 18 years of experience in finance and strategy.
  • He holds an MBA in Finance and NISM certification.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: RESPONSIVE INDUSTRIES LTD. | Category: Management Change

item.title: [MANGIND] DY Captive Projects LLP sells 4.4 Mn shares in Mangalam Industrial Finance
item.description:
DY Captive Projects LLP has disclosed the sale of 4,400,479 equity shares of Mangalam Industrial Finance Ltd. The shares were sold through open market transactions on April 9, 2026 (883,327 shares) and April 10, 2026 (3,517,152 shares). Prior to this sale, DY Captive Projects LLP held 80,829,853 shares, representing 5.67% of the company's total share capital. Following the sale, their holding has decreased to 76,429,374 shares, which constitutes 5.36% of Mangalam Industrial Finance Ltd. This disclosure was made as per Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.

  • DY Captive Projects LLP sold 4,400,479 equity shares of Mangalam Industrial Finance.
  • The sale was conducted via open market transactions on April 9 and 10, 2026.
  • The stake of DY Captive Projects LLP decreased from 5.67% to 5.36%.
  • The disclosure was made under SEBI Takeover Regulations 29(2).

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Mangalam Industrial Finance Ltd | Category: Shareholding
